mapper.select: SELECT d.*, dev.device_name, p.product_name FROM sp_iot_device_data d LEFT JOIN sp_iot_device dev ON d.device_key = dev.device_key LEFT JOIN sp_iot_product p ON dev.product_key = p.product_key WHERE d.device_key = #{deviceKey} ORDER BY d.collect_time DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sp_iot_device_data ( device_key, topic, method, params, timestamp, collect_time, create_time ) VALUES
( #{item.deviceKey}, #{item.topic}, #{item.method}, #{item.params}, #{item.timestamp}, #{item.collectTime}, NOW() )
